=Index of types=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="animation"| type Page_transition.animation >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The type of animation~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="attrib"| type Icons.S.attrib >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="button_labels"| type Calendar.button_labels >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An instance of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|button~_labels>> is used to customize the button
    labels~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="cropping"| type Picture_uploader.cropping >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="display"| type Style.display >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Style >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="elt"| type Icons.S.elt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons.S >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="glue"| type Sticky.glue >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Sticky >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|returned by <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make sticky>> ~(if position~:sticky is not supported~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="intl"| type Calendar.intl >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Calendar >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|intl>> is the type of internationalization specifiers~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="orientation"| type Size.orientation >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Size >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="resize_sensor"| type Noderesize.resize_sensor >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Noderesize >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="screenshot"| type Page_transition.PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF.screenshot >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition.PAGE_TRANSITION_CONF >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="screenshot"| type Page_transition.Make.screenshot >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page_transition.Make >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="service"| type Picture_uploader.service >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|a service that implements a function with type <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~'a ~-~> ~'b>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="simple_stop"| type Tongue.simple_stop >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Tongue >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="state"| type Pulltorefresh.state >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Pulltorefresh >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Represents the state of the gesture behavior~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="stop"| type Tongue.stop >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Tongue >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="t"| type Carousel.t >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Carousel >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|see <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="tongue"| type Tongue.tongue >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Tongue >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Signals contain the current
    position of the tongue~, as a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|simple~_stop>> or as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|int>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="upload"| type Picture_uploader.upload >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Picture_uploader >>~]||
\\
